description: Карта расчётных таблиц и шаблонов. Полные таблицы находятся в 04_CALCULATION_FRAME.md.

items.name: Face Map
items.purpose: 12 граней F00–F11, роли, нормали, mount constraints, conflicts.

items.name: Mount Compatibility Matrix
items.purpose: Совместимость классов модулей с face, bayonet, internal, paired, deployable, external.

items.name: Mass / CoM / Inertia Sheet
items.purpose: Масса, local positions, CoM_delta, inertia class, restrictions.

items.name: Power Budget Sheet
items.purpose: source → battery → bus → supercap → peak consumers.

items.name: Thermal Budget Sheet
items.purpose: Thermal nodes, temperatures, cooldown, blocked commands.

items.name: Thrust Map
items.purpose: Линейная тяга RCS; нельзя заявлять balanced thrust без неё.

items.name: Torque Map
items.purpose: Моменты RCS; нельзя заявлять all-axis control без неё.

items.name: Bayonet Bridge Sheet
items.purpose: Состояния bayonet/bridge: hard lock, safety, umbilical, passport, bridge allowed.

items.name: Module Passport Template
items.purpose: Минимальный контракт модуля как runtime-ready candidate.

items.name: NBL Emergency Packet Rules
items.purpose: Emergency low-rate packets, criticality, SoC_cap, thermal, audit.

items.name: Command Gating Matrix
items.purpose: Validation checks for commands through body state.

items.name: ORION Evidence Checklist
items.purpose: source, freshness, trust, status, reason_codes, audit, blackbox.
